calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Nov-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Holt-Smith.
Elizabeth Bailey, Esq. for Petitioner: Sun Kwang Lee, present as Guardian ad litem for: Elizabeth Lee, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,750.00
Medical Expenses $1,419.06
Costs $1,991.82
A net balance of $1,839.12 to be deposited into a blocked account with Cathy Bank, 3288 pierce St., Richmond, CA. 94804, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
